message.content: This section provides a 2025 (January–December) market analysis of mobile game advertising trends in China’s Hong Kong, Macau, and Taiwan regions, sourced from the 广大大 ad intelligence platform. It answers questions regarding market scale, creative format distribution, top-performing titles, monthly fluctuations, and regional player preferences. Key metrics include 111,000 active advertisers (+26% YoY), 19.7 million deduplicated creatives (+42% YoY), and a 70.2% video creative share (noted as the lowest globally). It identifies hot products including Lands of Jail, Top Heroes, Emblem Assemble: Neo, Seven Knights, Re:BIRTH, Chaos Zero Nightmare, and HAIKYU!! FLY HIGH. The section presents monthly time-series data for advertiser counts, new material ratios, total material volumes, and platform/OS distribution (82%/78%). It claims broad genre popularity, high acceptance of Chinese, Japanese, and Korean local IPs, and standout performance for RPG titles. Evidence types include ad intelligence metrics, YoY growth rates, monthly trend charts, and product rankings.
